    U

    unbookDeck(String) - Method in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.BuildingState
    Unbooks the deck for a player if they have booked one.
    UnconfirmedLoginState - Class in View.Client.States.Connected
    Represents the state of the client when a user has logged in but has not yet confirmed their login.
    UnconfirmedLoginState(Network, String) - Constructor for class View.Client.States.Connected.UnconfirmedLoginState
    Constructs an UnconfirmedLoginState with the specified network and username.
    UnconfirmedSelectionState - Class in View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn
    Represents the state of a logged-in user who has selected a game but has not yet confirmed their selection.
    UnconfirmedSelectionState(Network, String) - Constructor for class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.UnconfirmedSelectionState

    updateGame(Game) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Updates the game state with the provided game instance.
    updateGame(Game) - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectedState
    Updates the game state with the provided game instance.
    UpdateGameAction - Class in View.Client.Actions
    Represents an action to update the game state in the client.
    UpdateGameAction(Game) - Constructor for class View.Client.Actions.UpdateGameAction
    Constructs an UpdateGameAction with the specified game.
    updateList(Integer[]) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Updates the list of games available in the client state.
    updateList(Integer[]) - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectionState
    Updates the list of available games with a new list provided by the server.
    UpdateListAction - Class in View.Client.Actions
    Represents an action to update the list of game IDs in the client state.
    UpdateListAction(Integer[]) - Constructor for class View.Client.Actions.UpdateListAction
    Constructs an UpdateListAction with the specified new list of game IDs.
    UpdateListMessage - Class in Networking.Messages
    Represents a message sent by the server to update the list of game IDs.
    UpdateListMessage() - Constructor for class Networking.Messages.UpdateListMessage
     
    updatePosition(Player, int) - Method in class Model.Board.FlightBoard
     
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.AbandonedShip.AbandonedShipCrewRemovalState
    Called when a player wants to remove crew members from their ship.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState
    Handles the use of an item by a player during the combat zone phase, specifically for using batteries.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState
    Allows a player to use a battery item on a specific component during the power declaration phase of combat.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1CrewRemovalState
    Allows a player to remove a crewmate on a specific cabin during the crew removal phase of combat.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1ManageShotState
    Uses a battery to mitigate the effects of a cannon shot.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.CombatZone2_E_BatteryRemovalState
    Handles the use of an item by a player during the combat zone phase, specifically for using batteries.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.CombatZone2_P_BatteryRemovalState
    Handles the use of an item by a player during the combat zone phase, specifically for using batteries.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.CombatZone2ManageShotState
     
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.SecondCombatZone2BatteryRemovalState
    Handles the use of an item by a player during the combat zone phase, specifically for using batteries.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.Controller
     
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.MeteorsSwarm.ManageMeteorState
    Handles the use of an item during the meteor state.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.OpenSpace.OpenSpaceBatteryRemovalState
    Called when a player uses an item during this state.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.Pirates.PiratesBatteryRemovalState
    Called when a player attempts to use an item.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.Pirates.PiratesManageShotState
    Allows a player to attempt to block an incoming cannon shot using a battery-powered shield.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.Slavers.SlaversBatteryRemovalState
    Allows the player to use a battery from a specified BatteryCompartment on their ship.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.Slavers.SlaversCrewRemovalState
    Allows the current player to remove a crew member from one of their cabins.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.Smugglers.SecondSmugglersBatteryRemovalState
    Allows the player to remove a battery from a valid battery compartment as part of the penalty if they have no more goods.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersBatteryRemovalState
    Handles the use of a battery component by the current player.
    useItem(String, ItemType, Coordinates) - Method in class Controller.State

    username - Variable in class Networking.Messages.LoginMessage
    The username of the player attempting to log in.
    username - Variable in class View.Client.Actions.LoginAction
    The username of the user attempting to log in.
    username - Variable in class View.Client.Actions.LoginFailedAction
    The username that was attempted to be logged in.

    The username of the user who has successfully logged in.
